rationale.R1.2: Agent identifies several logical inconsistencies and proposes a reordering, but doesn't flag every inconsistency.
rationale.RX.1: Agent marks confidence for each recommendation and notes missing evidence effectively.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in original content.
rationale.RX.5: Major changes are traced, but minor edits lack traceability.
